title: White Quiche,18cm Pie Dish Flan Dish,Ceramic Oven Dish Baking Dishes,Ceramic Baking Tray for Pie,Quiche,Pizza, Pasta,Pastry
features: 【High Quality Material】Our quiche dish is made of high quality ceramic after high temperature, lead-free, non-toxic and odourless, no heavy metals, not easy to scratch, thick and durable. In addition, the ceramic material will not absorb food odours and prevent cascading, suitable for making desserts and snacks of various flavours. Microwave and Oven Safe.

【Unique Design】The wavy design on the edge of the flan dish is beautiful and stylish. And the fluted design can provide a better grip and prevents the pie dish from accidentally slipping. It also allows the dough to be pressed into a beautiful pie with a more elegant and appetising appearance.

【Easy to Clean】This pie dish has a smooth non-stick surface, easy to release and easy to clean, dishwasher safe or hand wash with soap and water. Easy to stack and store when not in use, save cabinet space. A must have container for making delicious pies and quiches in the kitchen.

【Multi-purpose】The ceramic baking dish measures 7 x 7 x 1 inches, and the height and thickness of the side walls can prevent spills and hold more food. Perfect for quiche, meat pies, pizza, baked macaroni, but also cream cheese cakes, pies and more!

【Perfect Gift】This classic round deep pie dish is beautiful and functional and makes a variety of beautiful pies and pizzas. Ideal gift for family, friends or colleagues at Christmas, Thanksgiving, birthdays, parties, housewarming parties, especially for baking lovers.
description: Product Description LONTOM 18cm White Porcelain Flan Dish Ideal for Baking The round Quiche Dish is suitable for baking quiches,fruit pies,pizza and tarts,ideal for preparing various of meals and desserts and for enjoying dinner with family. A Nice Assist to Your Kitchen Let this plate make your food look delightful and elegant.This round quiche baking dishmeasures 7.09 x1.8 inches,specially designed for meats pie,pizza,creamy cheesecake,dessert pies,quiche,baked macaroni,etc.Especialysuitable as aholiday piean. Advantages of our baking dishes Easy to store It can be placed upright in the cabinet to save space. Heat resistant Quiche baking tray is heat resistant.The wavy design at the edge of the puff pastry and microwave safety. Resistant to dyeing, beautiful and fashionable. The disc design can provide better grip and even heat distribution for perfect baking, resulting in a perfect pie every time. Easy to clean Simply wash with water and wait to dry.
